data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the tracking of rate limiting per integration partner.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of rate limiting per integration partner, but the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that this functionality is implemented or tested. The linked use cases focus on referral tracking and rewards but do not address the specific requirement of rate limiting, leading to an inconclusive status. Therefore, without concrete evidence of the rate limiting behavior, the validation cannot be completed.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of rate limiting per integration partner.
